title: URL Shortener REST API with In-Memory Storage

steps.description: Define URL domain entities and value objects with shortening business rules
steps.done_condition: URL and ShortCode entities implemented with validation logic

steps.description: Define port interfaces for URL repository and ID generation
steps.done_condition: URLRepository and IDGenerator port interfaces defined

steps.description: Implement in-memory URL repository with thread-safe operations
steps.done_condition: In-memory repository with mutex protection for concurrent access
Random short code generator producing URL-safe codes

steps.description: Implement REST handler for POST /shorten endpoint
steps.done_condition: HTTP handler accepting URL and returning short code

steps.description: Implement REST handler for GET /{short-code} endpoint
steps.done_condition: HTTP handler redirecting short codes to original URLs
Use case orchestrating URL validation, short code generation, and storage
Use case handling short code lookup and URL retrieval

steps.description: Wire all dependencies and configure HTTP server in main.go
steps.done_condition: Single binary with all components wired and HTTP server running

riskRegister.mitigation: Use mutex protection for all map operations
riskRegister.risk: Thread safety issues with in-memory storage

riskRegister.mitigation: Document memory growth characteristics for production consideration
riskRegister.risk: Memory leaks from unbounded URL storage

successCriteria: Single Go binary compiles and runs
POST /shorten accepts URLs and returns short codes
